89 typedef int8_t VL53L1_Error;
90 
91 #define VL53L1_ERROR_NONE ((VL53L1_Error) 0)
92 #define VL53L1_ERROR_CALIBRATION_WARNING ((VL53L1_Error) - 1)
93 
97 #define VL53L1_ERROR_MIN_CLIPPED ((VL53L1_Error) - 2)
98
